title: tephrosia procera
intro: Tephrosia procera, also known as the "Steel Plant" or "Ironwort," is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia procera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tephrosia procera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
